items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie. This critical flaw is actively exploited in the wild.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Security Update Released – APSB26-49
items.summary: This security update addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption.

items.title: Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in Modern Minds Magento 2 WordPress Integration
items.summary: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Modern Minds Magento 2 WordPress Integration m2wp allows Stored XSS. This affects versions up to 1.4.2.1.

items.title: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Codazon Magento Themes
items.summary: A reflected XSS vulnerability in Codazon Magento Themes v1.1.0.0 to v2.4.7 allows attackers to execute arbitrary Javascript via a crafted payload in the 'cat' parameter.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique. Sansec observed attacks on 79.5% of all stores.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (APSB26-05)
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.
